trivia_bullets.text: Light of Promise is an original card from Core Set 2021 (July 3, 2020), designed around the set's white lifegain theme. M21 featured vertical cycles around each mono-colored planeswalker; white's cycle leaned heavily on life-counter payoffs.

Flavor text: 'The light washed over him, and in the wind he heard the roars of all the pridemates who had come before.' References 'pridemates' — directly invoking Ajani's Pridemate and the leonin ancestral warrior tradition in white lifegain lore.

Previewed by Corocoro.jp on June 10, 2020 — a Japanese gaming magazine (also the venue for Pokémon and Nintendo previews), reflecting Wizards' practice of using Corocoro for Japanese-market MTG previews.

EDHREC rank 4339. Appears in Commander lifegain decks (~39% inclusion in Shalai and Hallar builds). Enables an infinite combo with Walking Ballista via lifelink: enchant Ballista, give it lifelink, loop ping-life-counter.

Functionally identical oracle text to Sunbond (Journey into Nyx, 2014): 'whenever you gain life, put that many +1/+1 counters on this creature.' Light of Promise is a reimagined Sunbond in the M21 frame. Only printed in M21 as of 2026 — no standard reprint.

related_cards.name: Ajani's Pridemate
related_cards.note: Flavor text directly references 'pridemates'; this aura is designed to sit on exactly this lifegain-counter type
